pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh SQL query and verifier.py logic.
Confirmed via verifier.py _check_link assertions matching the exact string constants.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the creation of a WordPress page titled 'Official Media Kit', verified via SQL queries and Python tests. It involves uploading three synthetically generated dummy files (PDF, ZIP, JPG) from ~/Documents/MediaKit/ and correctly formatting direct links to them on the created page with the exact link texts: 'Download Press Release', 'Download Brand Assets', and 'Download CEO Portrait'.
